summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ValuationOverTimeChart component. All 9 test features verified working correctly with 100% pass rate. Chart renders correctly with recharts AreaChart, shows proper empty state, respects project filter, and is mobile responsive.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - This is a minor recharts race condition during initial render that resolves itself. Not blocking.

passed_tests: Dashboard - Chart title 'Valuation Over Time' displays correctly ✓
Dashboard - Chart shows recharts AreaChart (line graph) when 2+ valuations exist ✓
Dashboard - Empty state shows 'Not enough data yet' when 0-1 valuations ✓
Dashboard - Trend indicator shows overall percentage (e.g., '+33.3% overall') ✓
Dashboard - Date range indicator shows at bottom of chart (e.g., 'Jan 29 → Feb 28') ✓
Dashboard - Valuations tracked count displays (e.g., '2 valuations tracked') ✓
Dashboard - Custom tooltip appears on hover showing date, value, company name ✓
Dashboard - Chart is responsive at 375px mobile width ✓
Dashboard - No runtime crashes when valuations array is empty ✓
Dashboard - Chart respects selectedProjectId filter (switches between chart and empty state) ✓
Dashboard - Blue gradient fill under area renders correctly ✓
Dashboard - Dashed border styling on empty state ✓
Dashboard - Minimum requirement message 'At least 2 valuations required' displays ✓

features_verified: Uses recharts AreaChart with gradient fill (linearGradient colorValue)
Filters valuations by selectedProjectId using useMemo
Sorts valuations by date ascending (oldest first)
Custom tooltip shows fullDate, value (formatted), and companyName
Trend indicator calculates overall percentage change
Date range indicator at bottom shows first and last dates
Receives valuations and selectedProjectId props correctly

critical_code_review_comments: ValuationOverTimeChart correctly implements all required features per PRD
Empty state message matches requirements: 'Not enough data yet' + 'Add more valuations to track your growth trajectory'
Chart uses recharts AreaChart (not LineChart) with blue gradient fill as expected
Minor: Unused imports (LineChart, Line) at lines 3-4 could be removed for cleaner code
Minor: Console warning about width/height -1 is a known recharts race condition, not a bug
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from iteration_9 (2 valuations in proj_snapshot_1772294140681). Created new session for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ValuationOverTimeChart component fully tested and working. Key implementation: uses recharts AreaChart with blue gradient (#0B4DBB), shows empty state when < 2 valuations, respects selectedProjectId filter. Test data: user_dashboard_snapshot_1772294140681 has 2 projects and 2 valuations ($8M, $6M on proj_snapshot_1772294140681). Empty state tested with session_chart_1772294762054 (user with 0 valuations). Mobile responsive tested at 375px width.
